_comment: Project-committed Claude Code settings. Per-user/host overrides go in .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored). Hooks here fire for ALL users who clone the repo; user-local hooks (e.g. check_stuck_before_agent.sh) remain in settings.local.json.

PostToolUse._doc: PR9-B: emit milestones from inside subagent contexts. Fires after every Bash, including Bash inside Agent+run_in_background:true subagents (verified by PR-V experiment 2026-04-27). Detects `lake build` → lake-build-{clean,fail}; otherwise no-op. Idempotent (skips if same milestone fired within 30s). Silent when SANDBOX env is unset (CLI standalone).
PR9-B: detect Write to `Statlean/**/*.lean` → re-run extract_sorries.py + emit sorry-pool-snapshot with delta. Same idempotency / sandbox rules as the Bash matcher.
PR9-B: same as Write matcher — Edit modifies a .lean file in-place, equally needs sorry-pool-snapshot refresh.
